_comment: Copy to targets.json and edit for your testbed. valid_cves = CVE ids that are real AND apply to these targets' services (used to score fabrication). expected_vulnerable is only used with --no-exploit for a pipeline dry-run.

targets.name: metasploitable2
scan_context_lines: Port 21 | ftp-vsftpd | Severity: high | vsftpd 2.3.4 backdoor, weak credentials
Port 22 | ssh | Severity: high | OpenSSH 4.7p1, weak/default credentials
Port 445 | smb | Severity: critical | Samba/SMB, MS17-010 candidate

targets.name: shellshock-host
scan_context_lines: Port 80 | http-apache-cgi | Severity: critical | Apache mod_cgi, Bash Shellshock (CVE-2014-6271)
